startup.description: Time from launch to dashboard visible

navigation.description: Time to navigate and render any page

search.description: Time to filter orders by search term (25 orders)

charts.description: Time to render all analytics charts

computeOrderStatuses.description: Max times computeOrderStatuses can be called per page switch

inventoryRender.description: Time to render portfolio page with 500 inventory items

inventorySearch.description: Time to filter 500 items by search term (includes 400ms debounce)

inventorySort.description: Time to sort and re-render 500 items

inventoryTabSwitch.description: Time to switch between Stock/Sales/Insights sub-tabs

inventoryMemory.description: Heap limits with 500 inventory items loaded
